items.title: Best Dividend Aristocrats For December 2025
items.description: The ProShares S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrats ETF (NOBL) has underperformed the SPDR S&P 500 ETF (SPY) year-to-date, but November shows a reversal.

items.title: Micron to invest $9.6 billion in Japan to build AI memory chip plant, Nikkei reports
items.description: Micron Technology will invest 1.5 trillion yen (​$9.6 billion) to build a new ‌plant in Hiroshima in western Japan to produce advanced high-bandwidth memory ‌(HBM) chips, the Nikkei reported on Saturday, citing people familiar with the matter.  The U.S. chipmaker aims to start construction at an existing site ⁠in May next year ‌and begin shipments around 2028, with Japan's Ministry of Economy, Trade and ‍Industry providing up to 500 billion yen for the project, the Nikkei said.  To revive ​its aging semiconductor industry, Japan's government is ‌offering generous subsidies to lure investment from foreign chip makers such as Micron and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co (TSMC).

items.title: This Sky-High Metric Says We're Probably in an AI Bubble
items.author: Timothy Green
items.description: The Shiller CAPE ratio suggests the stock market is experiencing an AI-fueled bubble, with the ratio nearing dot-com bubble levels. Tech companies are making massive AI infrastructure investments with uncertain returns, raising concerns about market exuberance.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Viewed as a safer AI investment focusing on consulting services and efficient AI model deployment with proven business value
Large AI infrastructure spending with speculative future returns, but CEO confident in potential profitability
